lineups.name: Xbox Smoke from T Spawn
lineups.description:
Blocks the CT AWP from mid doors. THE most important T-side smoke on Dust II — throw it every single round to allow safe mid-to-B or catwalk crossing.

Stand in T Spawn near the right-side wall, aligned with the corner of the dark doorframe overhead.

Look up at the antenna/wire above T Spawn. Place crosshair just below where the wire meets the wall on the left building.

Whoever has the closest spawn throws this. Must land before CTs set up mid AWP. If it fails, your team dies crossing mid doors.

lineups.name: A Site CT Spawn Smoke from Long
lineups.description:
Blocks CT spawn/ramp connection to A site. Essential for any A take — prevents CTs rotating through spawn from catching you on site.

Stand at A Long near the corner of the blue container/dumpster, lined up with the right edge of pit wall.

Look up at the building ahead. Place crosshair on the corner of the wooden overhang above the CT spawn archway.

Jump throw. Without this smoke, CTs can freely peek from spawn during your plant. Throw after taking long control.

lineups.name: A Long Pop Flash
lineups.description:
Blinds CTs holding pit or A site as your team pushes out of long doors.

Inside long doors, right side, a few steps before the exit to long A.

Face the exit and aim at the top edge of the doorway. Right-click underhand toss so it pops instantly over the door.

Right-click underhand throw. Push out the instant the flash leaves your hand — it pops almost immediately above the doors.

lineups.name: CT Spawn Molotov from A Long
lineups.description:
Burns out CTs hiding behind the CT spawn boxes during an A take. Forces them to rotate or peek into your crosshairs.

A Long near the pit area, pressed against the right-side wall.

Aim high above the A site toward CT spawn, arc the molotov over the wall so it lands behind the boxes at CT.

Left-click full throw. High arc needed to clear the walls. Pairs with CT spawn smoke for a complete CT deny.

lineups.name: A Short Pop Flash (Catwalk)
lineups.description:
Blinds CTs holding A site or short from the catwalk push. Pops over the staircase wall.

Top of catwalk stairs, pressed against the right wall before the corner.

Face the A site direction. Right-click underhand throw the flash off the wall above the corner — it pops over the top instantly.

Right-click underhand throw. The flash bounces off the wall above and pops instantly into A site. Push immediately.

lineups.name: B Window Smoke from Tunnels
lineups.description:
Blocks the CT AWP watching from B window (doors). Critical for any B site take — without this smoke, the window player picks off your whole team.

Inside upper B tunnels, stand against the left wall near the exit toward B site.

Look up and to the left. Aim at the dark spot on the ceiling beam where it meets the stone arch.

Jump throw. Must land before your team exits tunnels. Combine with B doors/car smoke for a full B execute.

lineups.name: B Tunnels Exit Flash
lineups.description:
Blinds CTs holding B site as your team exits upper tunnels.

Inside upper B tunnels, behind the entry player near the exit.

Face the B tunnels exit. Right-click underhand throw off the upper wall — flash pops into site instantly.

Right-click underhand throw. Push out immediately after releasing. The first player out should already be moving as the flash is thrown.

lineups.name: Long Doors Smoke from CT
lineups.description:
Blocks T-side long doors push. Foundation CT-side A hold — gives you time to set up on long or rotate if they push.

At the A site corner near the barrel, facing toward long A.

Look up toward the sky above long. Place crosshair on the corner of the building edge overhead.

Jump throw. Throw this early round. If Ts push through the smoke, you hear footsteps and can call for backup.

lineups.name: B Tunnels Smoke from B Site
lineups.description:
Blocks the B tunnel exit. Foundation CT-side B hold — solo anchor's lifeline to delay pushes.

On B site behind the big box, facing the upper tunnel entrance.

Aim directly at the upper tunnel exit — left-click throw the smoke to land in the archway.

Left-click throw. Simple lineup — just throw it at the tunnel exit. Follow up with molly for ~25 sec of delay.

lineups.name: Mid Doors Smoke from CT Spawn
lineups.description:
Blocks mid doors from CT spawn. Prevents Ts from getting mid control or AWPing through doors early round.

CT spawn, right side near the wall facing mid doors.

Look up at the building above mid. Aim at the rooftop edge/antenna above mid doors.

Jump throw. An alternative to playing the mid AWP — smoke it off and play passive. Good for eco/force rounds.

scenarios.name: A Default Take
scenarios.description: Standard A-site execute with CT smoke + long flash + default molly. A-man entries through long, B-man supports, support-man holds rotates.

actions.description: Molly CT spawn boxes after entering long
Pop flash long doors for entry
Smoke CT spawn to isolate A site
Smoke xbox to deny mid-doors AWP

scenarios.name: B Split
scenarios.description: Four-man B split — two through tunnels, two through mid-doors. Requires mid control first.

actions.description: Flash B site for tunnel exit

scenarios.name: Mid Control
scenarios.description: Two-man mid take with xbox smoke + mid-doors flash. Sets up B split or A short rotate.

actions.description: Smoke xbox to cross into lower mid

scenarios.name: B Execute with Mid Smoke
scenarios.description: Three-man B execute via tunnels, with mid-doors smoke to deny CT rotate from mid. Classic.

actions.description: Flash B site for tunnel exit
Smoke xbox to deny mid rotate

scenarios.name: A Long Default
scenarios.description: Quick two-man long take with pop flash + CT smoke. Hits A while the team contests mid/B.

actions.description: Molly CT spawn after entering long
Pop flash long doors for entry push
Smoke CT spawn to isolate A site

ctPositions.label: A Anchor
ctPositions.description: Solo or paired hold of A site. Delay long pushes, fall back to CT for the retake.
ctPositions.spawnHint: Spawn near CT-1 or CT-5, walk down ramp to pit or default plant.
ctPositions.utilityFocus: Smoke long doors early to cut the T push. Molly default plant before site contact. Carry a flash for retake.

ctPositions.label: B Anchor
ctPositions.description: Solo hold B site. Delay tunnels with smoke + molly, fall back to car for the retake.
ctPositions.spawnHint: Spawn near CT-2 or CT-4, walk down B doors to plat.
ctPositions.utilityFocus: Smoke B tunnels at 0:10 left. Molly default plant when you hear footsteps. HE the smoke if 3+ Ts push.

ctPositions.label: Mid Control
ctPositions.description: Take and contest mid early. Rotate to whichever site takes pressure.
ctPositions.spawnHint: Spawn near CT-3, push to mid doors or top mid.
ctPositions.utilityFocus: Smoke mid doors if you can not get the AWP pick. Flash short on aggressive pushes. Track lurkers headed to B.

ctPositions.label: Aggressive AWP
ctPositions.description: Pick attempt early-round on mid or short, fall back behind teammate flashes.
ctPositions.spawnHint: Spawn near CT-3, push catwalk or mid doors.
ctPositions.utilityFocus: Smoke mid doors when you need to disengage. One flash held for support on the retake.

ctPositions.label: Rotator / Late
ctPositions.description: Hold CT spawn, rotate to whichever site takes pressure first.
ctPositions.spawnHint: Stay in CT spawn, watch info from anchors.
ctPositions.utilityFocus: Carry one smoke + one flash. Save utility for the retake site, not the initial hold.

plants.name: A site default (under default)
plants.description: Plant in the default-plant pit just behind site main entrance. Smokes off long + CT cover the most common picks.

plants.name: A site goose plant
plants.description: Plant behind goose (right of site as you enter from main). Forces CT to clear two corners on retake.

plants.name: B site default (behind car)
plants.description: Plant behind the orange car. Standard B plant — CT must cross open ground to defuse.

plants.name: B site window plant
plants.description: Plant tucked at window. Lets a tunnel/door player hold defuse from a tight angle.

timings.label: Buy + walk window (0:00–0:15)
timings.body: Buy in spawn, call rush spawns, walk to mid/long/tunnels before noise window opens.

timings.label: Xbox smoke lands by 0:05 left of freeze
timings.body: Whoever has the closest T spawn (T-1/T-5/T-6) throws the xbox smoke before pushing mid.

timings.label: Mid control decided 0:15–0:25 in
timings.body: Mid AWP duel or mid smoke set. If you lose mid, fall back; if you win it, the B split is open.

timings.label: Site hit 0:25–0:45 in
timings.body: Most T executes start around the 0:30 mark — late enough to read CT positions, early enough to leave 30+ seconds for the plant.

timings.label: CT default smokes by 0:10 left of freeze
timings.body: B-anchor smokes tunnels; A-anchor mollies default. Buys time before any T contact.

timings.label: CT rotates committed by 0:45 in
timings.body: Once a site takes contact, the rotator commits. Late rotate means a 4v3 on the wrong site.

timings.label: Post-plant utility cycles ~5s
timings.body: After plant, cycle a molly every ~5 seconds across the defuse spot. Don't blow all utility at once.

spawnRushes.description: Front-right T-1 to long: usually arrives at doors before CT-3 / CT-5 can set up pit.
Symmetric to T-1; works against CT-3.
T-6 (mid-cluster front) wins the mid AWP duel against most CT mid spawns when peeking off the smoke.
Back-left T-14: with a flash you arrive at tunnels exit before the B anchor sets up.
